channel.title: Microsoft Service Health Tracker — A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Microsoft 365 service health incidents — tracked and searchable

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users are unable to access Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat or portal.office.com
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to access Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat or portal.office.com.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users cannot access Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users cannot access Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may encounter an error when using the Microsoft 365 Copilot rewrite feature in classic Outlook
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may encounter an error when using the Copilot rewrite feature in classic Outlook.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may encounter an error when using the Microsoft 365 Copilot rewrite feature in classic Outlook
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may encounter an error when using the Copilot rewrite feature in classic Outlook.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] June 9 security update notes aren’t available on learn.microsoft.com for Microsoft 365 apps & Office
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] June 9 security update notes aren’t available on learn.microsoft.com for Microsoft 365 apps & Office.

item.title: [SharePoint Online] Users may be unable to access Excel files through browser from SharePoint Online
item.description: [SharePoint Online] Users may be unable to access Excel files through browser from SharePoint Online.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins' Microsoft 365 Copilot usage reports within the Microsoft 365 admin center may be delayed
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins' Microsoft 365 Copilot usage reports within the Microsoft 365 admin center may be delayed.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may experience degradation with Microsoft 365 Copilot responses after uploading a file
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have experienced degradation with Copilot responses after uploading a file.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Some users may experience degradation with Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat responses after uploading a file
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users may have experienced degradation with Copilot Chat responses after uploading a file.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may fail to retrieve Microsoft OneNote content using Microsoft Graph APIs
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have failed to retrieve Microsoft OneNote content using Microsoft Graph APIs.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may see latency when using tools and chats in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have seen latency when using tools and chats in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Issue with webhook-based task notifications in Microsoft To Do
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users are unable to receive webhook-based task notifications in Microsoft To Do.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some users' Windows devices with policies configured to prevent auto updates may be installing drivers
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users' Windows devices with configured policies to prevent auto updates might have been installing drivers.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may intermittently be unable to complete Microsoft 365 Copilot requests or receive responses
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have intermittently been unable to complete Copilot requests or receive responses.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may be unable to access the Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365) desktop or web app
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have been unable to access the Copilot desktop or web app.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users may have received no response when prompting Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat using the Claude Opus model
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users may have received no response when prompting Copilot Chat using the Claude Opus model.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Unable to open files in Office for the web or Microsoft Teams
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to open files in Office for the web or Microsoft Teams.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some users may have been unable to setup Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) or access the mysignins.microsoft.com website
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to setup MFA or access the mysignins.microsoft.com website.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may be unable to create new online meetings from shared calendar events in Exchange Online
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may be unable to create new online meetings from shared calendar events in Exchange Online.

item.title: [Azure] Azure incident affecting West US 2
item.description: [Azure] Between 04:24 on 29 May 2026 and 02:30 UTC on 30 May 2026, customers with resources in the West US 2 region may have experienced failures when attempting to access or manage Azure services in the region. Impact included connectivity failures, resource unavailability, and failures when attempting to create, update, or scale resources. The issue was triggered by a severe thunderstorm with lightning strikes that resulted in utility power loss to multiple datacenter facilities serving the region. Ba

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may not have seen responses from Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365) custom engine agents
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may not have seen responses from Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365) custom engine agents.

item.title: [Power BI] Users may be unable to initiate Spark sessions or open and perform actions in Microsoft Fabric Notebooks
item.description: [Power BI] Users may have been unable to initiate Spark sessions or open and perform actions in Microsoft Fabric Notebooks.

item.title: [Power BI] Users may be unable to perform control plane operations on their capacities in Microsoft Fabric
item.description: [Power BI] Users may have been unable to perform control plane operations on their capacities in Microsoft Fabric.

item.title: [Azure] Azure incident affecting Australia East, Sweden Central, West US 2
item.description: [Azure] Between 09:39 UTC and 17:05 UTC on 29 May 2026, customers using the Azure OpenAI Service may have experienced increased latency, intermittent request failures, timeouts, and/or HTTP 5XX errors when submitting inference requests. The impact was more pronounced in regions in Europe and Australia East that were directly processing the highest levels of affected traffic. The incident was triggered by an upstream change that altered how certain capacity-related failures were surfaced, which led to a

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may be unable to use Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may be unable to use Microsoft 365 Copilot.

item.title: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Some admins may be unable to access and manage configured GDAP tenants in Microsoft Defender
item.description: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Admins may have been unable to access and manage configured GDAP tenants in Microsoft Defender.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may see older draft email messages appear as recently modified in Exchange Online
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may have seen older draft email messages appear as recently modified in Exchange Online.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some admins' Viva Learning activity reports may be delayed in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins' Viva Learning activity reports may be delayed in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Users were intermittently unable to access Exchange Online
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users were intermittently unable to access Exchange Online.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some admins' Copilot usage and chat report data may be delayed from appearing in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins' Copilot usage and chat report data may have been delayed from appearing in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Planner] Some users may encounter issues accessing features in the Microsoft Planner application
item.description: [Planner] Users may have encountered issues accessing features in the Microsoft Planner application.

item.title: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Some admins may experience a gap in security telemetry data and alerts in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint and Identity
item.description: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Admins may experience a gap in security telemetry data and alerts in Microsoft Defender for Endpoint and Identity.

item.title: [Microsoft Intune] Some users' Microsoft Intune devices may be unable to retrieve Intune Management Agent scripts from the service
item.description: [Microsoft Intune] Users' Microsoft Intune devices may have been unable to retrieve Intune Management Agent scripts from the service.

item.title: [Microsoft Intune] Users’ mobile application management (MAM) apps may crash if launched on devices running Android 17 QRP1 beta 3
item.description: [Microsoft Intune] Users’ MAM apps may have crashed if launched on an Android device with the Android 17 QRP1 beta 3 update.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some admins may be unable to view usage reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins were unable to view usage reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Power BI] Users may be unable to access or may experience delays when accessing Microsoft Fabric
item.description: [Power BI] Users may have been unable to access or may have experienced delays when accessing Microsoft Fabric.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users' draft generation prompts to Microsoft 365 Copilot may not complete in the classic Outlook desktop app Build 2605
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users' draft generation prompts to Copilot may not have completed in the classic Outlook desktop app Build 2605.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users may be unable to access Copilot Voice in Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat or conduct voice conversations
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users may have been unable to access Copilot Voice in Copilot Chat or conduct voice conversations.

item.title: [Microsoft Viva] Some users may see that some Viva Engage message posting operations are failing
item.description: [Microsoft Viva] Users may have seen that some Viva Engage message posting operations were failing.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some admins' Copilot usage and chat report data may be delayed from appearing in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins' Copilot usage and chat report data may have been delayed from appearing in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users intermittently may be unable to create Copilot Notebooks through Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users intermittently may have been unable to create Copilot Notebooks through Copilot.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may see stale or delayed report data in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may have seen stale or delayed report data in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Some users may be unable to access Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat via any connection method
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users may have been unable to access Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat via any connection method.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may be unable to initiate Office app installations in the My Account portal found within portal.office.com
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to initiate Office app installations in the My Account portal found within portal.office.com.

item.title: [SharePoint Online] Users may be unable to edit pages using SharePoint Designer
item.description: [SharePoint Online] Users may be unable to edit pages using SharePoint Designer.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users are unable to access Microsoft 365 services in South America
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some users were unable to access Microsoft 365 services.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 apps] Admins may not see new policies apply from the Cloud Policy service for devices running Win32 Microsoft 365 apps
item.description: [Microsoft 365 apps] Admins may have not seen new policies apply from the Cloud Policy service for devices running Win32 Microsoft 365 apps.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 apps] Users may be unable to install Microsoft 365 apps on their Windows device
item.description: [Microsoft 365 apps] Users may have been unable to install Microsoft 365 apps on their Windows device.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some admins may experience delays of up to 72 hours receiving app usage reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may have experienced delays of up to 72 hours receiving app usage reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Users’ text may turn blank when translated from the reading pane in Outlook desktop and Outlook on the web
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users’ text may turn blank when translated from the reading pane in Outlook desktop and Outlook on the web.
